tools.name: search_tradespeople
tools.description: Search for tradespeople on meseriasi.ro by location and/or category (trade type). Returns a paginated list of matching profiles.

tools.name: get_tradesperson_profile
tools.description: Fetch the full profile of a tradesperson by their UUID (or legacy WordPress integer ID). Includes bio, location, trade type, and bid statistics.

tools.name: request_chat_otp
tools.description: Send a one-time password (OTP) to the user's email so they can verify their identity before starting a conversation with a tradesperson. Call this first, then call start_conversation with the OTP the user receives.

tools.name: start_conversation
tools.description: Verify the OTP sent to the user's email and start a direct conversation with a tradesperson. Creates a homeowner account automatically if the email is new.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a new project on meseriasi.ro as a homeowner. Notifies nearby tradespeople automatically. Requires the caller to supply a valid Supabase access token in the "access_token" argument.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "request_chat_otp" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
